entries.name: staff-check-probation-ending
entries.purpose: Daily 06:00 UTC: probation-ending reminders at 14 / 7 / 1 day thresholds.

entries.name: staff-expire-coach-certifications
entries.purpose: Daily 02:00 UTC: mark expired certifications + fire 30/14/7-day pre-expiry reminders.

entries.name: staff-reconcile-branch-manager
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: verify one-active-branch-manager-per-branch invariant. Every finding is a P1 signal.

entries.name: staff-purge-offboarded
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: 90-day PII redaction pass + 7-year hard-purge pass.

entries.name: staff-aggregate-coach-ratings
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: recompute Coach.rating from Wave 3+ SessionRating rows. Wave 2b no-op placeholder.
